text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It enables machines to analyze text by recognizing words, grammar, and meaning. One common use is translation, where software can convert sentences between languages almost instantly. Another application is sentiment analysis, which determines whether a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral emotions. You might also encounter NLP in chatbots, which can answer questions and hold simple conversations. From spell checkers to virtual assistants, NLP makes it possible for computers to communicate with us more naturally, improving how we interact with technology every day.
